诓.origin: 诓 has the speech radical 讠 and means to deceive with words.

诚.origin: 诚 has the speech radical 讠 and means honest and sincere.

诛.origin: 诛 has the speech radical 讠 and means to punish or to put to death.

详.origin: 详 has the speech radical 讠 and means detailed and complete.

诳.origin: 诳 has the speech radical 讠 and means to lie or deceive.

诸.origin: 诸 has the speech radical 讠 and means all or various.

课.origin: 课 has the speech radical 讠 and means a lesson or class.

sentence.en: We are about to have class.

调.origin: 调 has the speech radical 讠; read diào it means a tune or to transfer.

sentence.en: This song has a beautiful tune.

谅.origin: 谅 has the speech radical 讠 and means to forgive or to understand.

谈.origin: 谈 has the speech radical 讠 and means to talk or to chat.

谋.origin: 谋 has the speech radical 讠 and means to plan or to scheme.

谓.origin: 谓 has the speech radical 讠 and means to call or to say.

谜.origin: 谜 has the speech radical 讠 and means a riddle or puzzle.

谣.origin: 谣 has the speech radical 讠 and means a rumor or a folk song.

谨.origin: 谨 has the speech radical 讠 and means careful and cautious.

谭.origin: 谭 has the speech radical 讠 and is mostly used as a family name.

谱.origin: 谱 has the speech radical 讠 and means a chart, list, or music score.

sentence.en: She is reading the music score.

谷.origin: 谷 pictures a valley between hills; it also means grain.

sentence.en: It is quiet in the valley.

豁.origin: 豁 has the valley 谷 and means open and clear, or a gap.

sentence.en: There is a gap in the wall.

豆.origin: 豆 once pictured a tall serving dish; now it means beans.

豫.origin: 豫 means relaxed and carefree; it is also short for Henan province.

貂.origin: 貂 has the beast radical 豸 and means a sable or mink.

sentence.en: This is a mink fur coat.

貉.origin: 貉 has the beast radical 豸 and means a raccoon dog.

sentence.en: There are raccoon dogs in the mountains.

贝.origin: 贝 pictures a seashell, once used as money in ancient times.

sentence.en: I am picking up seashells at the beach.

负.origin: 负 shows a person carrying money 贝; it means to carry or to lose.

财.origin: 财 has the shell 贝 for money and means wealth.

责.origin: 责 has the shell 贝 below and means duty or to blame.

贤.origin: 贤 has the shell 贝 and means virtuous and worthy.

败.origin: 败 means to lose or be defeated, the opposite of win.

sentence.en: Failure is the mother of success.

账.origin: 账 has the shell 贝 for money and means accounts or bills.

货.origin: 货 has the shell 贝 for money and means goods or merchandise.

sentence.en: The truck is full of goods.

质.origin: 质 has the shell 贝 and means quality or nature.

sentence.en: This thing is of good quality.

贩.origin: 贩 has the shell 贝 for money and means a peddler who buys and sells.

sentence.en: There are vendors on the street.

贪.origin: 贪 has the shell 贝 for money and means greedy.

贫.origin: 贫 means money 贝 split up 分, so poor and needy.

贬.origin: 贬 has the shell 贝 and means to lower the value or to demote.

贯.origin: 贯 pictures money 贝 strung together; it means to pierce through.

sentence.en: This road runs through the whole city.

贰.origin: 贰 is the formal way to write two 二, using 贝 to prevent forgery.

贱.origin: 贱 has the shell 贝 and means cheap or of low value.

贵.origin: 贵 has the shell 贝 for money and means expensive or precious.

贷.origin: 贷 has the shell 贝 for money and means to lend or to borrow.

sentence.en: He took a loan from the bank.

费.origin: 费 has the shell 贝 for money and means fees or to spend.

贺.origin: 贺 means to add 加 to someone's fortune 贝, so to congratulate.

贼.origin: 贼 has the shell 贝 and means a thief.

贾.origin: 贾 has the shell 贝 and once meant a merchant; today it is a family name.

赁.origin: 赁 means to pay money 贝 for use, so to rent or lease.

资.origin: 资 has the shell 贝 for money and means funds or capital.

赊.origin: 赊 has the shell 贝 for money and means to buy on credit.

sentence.en: He buys on credit at the shop.

赋.origin: 赋 has the shell 贝 for money and means tax or to bestow.

赌.origin: 赌 has the shell 贝 for money and means to bet or gamble.
